query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: resolve Trondheim municipality geometry and identifiers

2.description: identify high risk class code from quick-clay hazard lookup table

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by high risk class and Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: retrieve parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m²

5.description: identify parcels intersecting high risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per parcel

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geom FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';
SELECT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier::int DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT omrade AS geom, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse AS risk_class FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;<TRONDHEIM_GEOM_WKT>'));
